shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "yet-another-react-lightbox thumbnails finite carousel window preload" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '80,155p' src/modules/Carousel.tsx; sed -n '1,140p' src/types.ts | tail -30; cat package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "git branch -a --contains HEAD; git log -1 --format='%H %s' && git tag --contains HEAD | head"
/bin/bash -lc 'git show --stat --oneline bafdda0 && git show bafdda0 -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx src/modules/Carousel.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"globalIndex|currentIndex\" src/modules src/contexts | head -120; sed -n '1,220p' src/contexts/LightboxState.tsx 2>/dev/null || true; rg -n \"globalIndex\" src"

/bin/bash -lc 'npx eslint src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts; git diff --check; git diff -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts; git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "finite carousel thumbnail preload cap looping half slide count" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In yet-another-react-lightbox, thumbnail preload caps differ by carousel mode: finite mode may use up to slides.length - 1 so edge windows can include every real slide, while looping mode must cap at floor(slides.length / 2) to avoid duplicate wrapped thumbnails. Applying the looping cap to finite thumbnails causes missing real thumbnails at finite endpoints." -t "Thumbnail preload caps depend on finite mode" --unit-type learning -l thumbnails -s codex -i 0.8'
